notes: Pair 1 (parcel_delivery_mix vs restaurant_delivery_channel_mix): different — logistics ground/air parcel shipment mode mix (BBB,CCC) vs restaurant dine-in-to-delivery order channel shift (AAA); shared 'delivery'/'mix' tokens are coincidental.
